title: coluteastrum capitatum
intro: Coluteastrum capitatum, also known as the hairy hairy cat's whisker or hairy caltrop, is a type of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae. The plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Coluteastrum capitatum include reducing fever, alleviating pain, and treating various skin conditions, as well as providing protection against oxidative stress and cell damage. In herbal preparations, Coluteastrum capitatum is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat a range of health issues.
